This is a runtime aggregation artifact (already modified at session start) regenerated by THIS interactive session's own ambient Stop hooks (aggregate_triage_on_stop.py) — NOT touched by the iterate. All iterate edits are verifiably isolated in the worktree (12 hooks.json + architecture.md + hooks-and-pipeline.md + 6 new files). Operator-acknowledged 2026-05-29; proceeding.
